corrections.current: καὶ νῦν ἐν πάσῃ καρδίᾳ καὶ στόματι ὑμνήσατε,
corrections.correct: καὶ νῦν ἐν πάσῃ καρδίᾳ καὶ στόματι ὑμνήσαμεν,
corrections.note: Printed text reads first person plural aorist, not imperative.
Lemma in apparatus is dative plural αυτοις, matching body αὐτοὺς/αὐτοῖς context; transcript dropped ις.
Apparatus uses Latin 'om', not 'οm' with Greek omicron.
Latin abbreviation begins with Roman letters 'poix', not Greek ποιχ.
Apparatus lemma should match printed body reading ὑμνήσαμεν; transcript was altered to the variant/normalized form.

notes: Running head and marginal line indicators match. Body is otherwise accurate; page number 726 at foot correctly omitted from review scope.
